steps.title: Distribute the negative sign
steps.content: To remove the parentheses, distribute the negative sign through the second group. $(8x^3 + 8) - (x^3 - 2)$ becomes: $$8x^3 + 8 - x^3 + 2$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Group the $x^3$ terms and constant terms separately:
  • $x^3$ terms: $8x^3 - x^3 = 7x^3$
  • Constants: $8 + 2 = 10$
The simplified expression is $7x^3 + 10$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
